mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_intraday_execution_snapshot ( stock_code, trade_date, price_1430, low_1435_1444, low_1445_1454, low_1455_1500, high_0930_0935, high_0936_0940, high_0941_0944, price_0945, valid_flag, invalid_reason, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.stockCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.price1430}, #{item.low14351444}, #{item.low14451454}, #{item.low14551500}, #{item.high09300935}, #{item.high09360940}, #{item.high09410944}, #{item.price0945}, #{item.validFlag}, #{item.invalidReason}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
